name: Improve User Alignment
reason: User alignment at 0.65 floor. I have 20+ conversation modules but haven't tested whether they actually make me helpful. Time to find out and fix the gaps.
steps: Simulate real conversation scenarios and honestly assess my performance
Identify the specific gap between my infrastructure and actual helpfulness
Build ONE concrete improvement — not another module, an actual fix
Test the fix with a real scenario
Measure whether my conversation quality actually improved
